metrics.label: Resemblyzer similarity
metrics.description: Cosine similarity between target and generated Resemblyzer embeddings.

metrics.label: F0 RMSE
metrics.description: Root-mean-square error between aligned source and generated F0 contours.

metrics.label: F0 correlation
metrics.description: Pearson correlation between aligned source and generated F0 contours.

metrics.label: SingMOS naturalness
metrics.description: Mean SingMOS-Pro score across 5-second generated-audio chunks.
